summary: Complete testing of Settings page for AMLGuard. 36/36 backend tests passed. All 6 tabs (General, Risk Scoring, Integrations, Notifications, Team Members, Compliance Rules) working correctly with full CRUD operations and save functionality.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/settings returns 200
Backend: Settings has general section with company_name, timezone, currency
Backend: General settings has default values (AMLGuard Demo, Asia/Kolkata, INR)
Backend: Settings has risk_scoring section with 5 weight fields
Backend: Settings has integrations section with 3 providers (signzy, opensanctions, sanction_scanner)
Backend: Each integration has enabled, api_key, status fields
Backend: Settings has notifications section with 4 toggles
Backend: Settings has compliance_rules section with 3 rules + rescreen interval
Backend: PUT /api/settings/general updates company name
Backend: PUT /api/settings/general updates timezone
Backend: PUT /api/settings/general updates currency
Backend: PUT /api/settings/risk-scoring updates weights
Backend: Risk weights respect max limits (40/40/30/20/15)
Backend: PUT /api/settings/integrations/{provider} updates API key
Backend: Toggle integration enabled/disabled works
Backend: POST /api/settings/integrations/{provider}/test returns connected when API key exists
Backend: POST /api/settings/integrations/{provider}/test returns demo when no API key
Backend: Invalid provider returns 400
Backend: PUT /api/settings/notifications updates toggles
Backend: PUT /api/settings/compliance-rules updates rules
Backend: Rescreen interval can be set to 30/60/90 days
Backend: GET /api/settings/team returns team members list
Backend: Team members have id, name, email, role, status fields
Backend: POST /api/settings/team/invite creates new member with invited status
Backend: Invite requires name and email
Backend: Invite validates role (compliance_officer, analyst, read_only_auditor)
Backend: Cannot invite duplicate email
Backend: PUT /api/settings/team/{id}/role updates member role
Backend: DELETE /api/settings/team/{id} removes member
Backend: Cannot remove yourself
Backend: Settings endpoint requires authentication
Backend: Team endpoint requires authentication
Frontend: Settings page renders with 6 tab buttons
Frontend: Tab navigation switches between tabs correctly
Frontend: General tab shows Company Name input pre-filled with 'AMLGuard Demo'
Frontend: General tab shows Timezone select (Asia/Kolkata)
Frontend: General tab shows Currency select (INR)
Frontend: General tab shows Logo upload area
Frontend: General tab Save Changes button works (shows 'Saved')
Frontend: Risk Scoring tab shows 5 sliders with correct max values (40/40/30/20/15)
Frontend: Risk Scoring tab shows Score Preview with Low/Medium/High profiles
Frontend: Risk Scoring tab shows Total weight indicator (100/145 max)
Frontend: Risk Scoring tab Save Weights button works
Frontend: Integrations tab shows 3 provider cards (Signzy, OpenSanctions, Sanction Scanner)
Frontend: Integration cards show status indicators (Demo Mode)
Frontend: Integration cards have API key input, Save button, Test Connection button
Frontend: Integration toggle enables/disables provider
Frontend: Test Connection button updates status
Frontend: Notifications tab shows 4 toggle switches
Frontend: Notifications tab Save Preferences button works
Frontend: Team Members tab shows table with Name, Email, Role, Status, Actions columns
Frontend: Team Members tab shows 8 members with role badges (Super Admin, Compliance Officer, Analyst)
Frontend: Team Members tab shows status badges (Active, Invited)
Frontend: Team Members tab Edit and Remove action buttons visible
Frontend: Invite Member button opens form with Name, Email, Role fields
Frontend: Invite form has Send Invite button
Frontend: Compliance Rules tab shows 3 toggle rules
Frontend: Compliance Rules tab shows Re-Screen interval selector (30/60/90 days)
Frontend: Compliance Rules tab Save Rules button works
seed_data_creation: Default settings seeded on startup with: General (AMLGuard Demo, Asia/Kolkata, INR), Risk Scoring (25/30/20/15/10 weights), Integrations (3 providers in demo mode), Notifications (high_risk_screening and case_escalated enabled), Compliance Rules (auto_create_case and auto_escalate enabled, 90 day rescreen). Demo team members seeded: Priya Sharma (compliance_officer), Rahul Verma (analyst), Anita Desai (compliance_officer).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings page fully tested. All 6 tabs working: General (company name, logo upload, timezone, currency), Risk Scoring (5 sliders with max limits 40/40/30/20/15, score preview panel), Integrations (3 providers - Signzy, OpenSanctions, Sanction Scanner with API key input, test connection, toggle), Notifications (4 email toggles), Team Members (table with CRUD operations, invite form), Compliance Rules (3 toggle rules + rescreen interval 30/60/90 days). Backend endpoints: GET /api/settings, PUT /api/settings/general, PUT /api/settings/risk-scoring, PUT /api/settings/integrations/{provider}, POST /api/settings/integrations/{provider}/test, PUT /api/settings/notifications, PUT /api/settings/compliance-rules, GET /api/settings/team, POST /api/settings/team/invite, PUT /api/settings/team/{id}/role, DELETE /api/settings/team/{id}. All endpoints require authentication. Integration test connection returns demo/connected based on API key presence (MOCKED).

mocked_apis.integration_test_connection: Returns demo/connected based on API key presence, no actual external API calls

general_tab.logo_upload: Dashed border upload area with icon
general_tab.currency: Select dropdown with 6 currency options (INR, USD, EUR, GBP, SGD, AED)

integrations_tab.test_connection: Returns status based on API key presence
